summary: Completed testing of Driver Reports (Ethical Complaints) feature. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified - DriverReportsTab in admin panel, ReportDriverModal with categories and validation, report button in OrderTrackingPage.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: POST /api/delivery/report-driver requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: POST /api/delivery/report-driver forbidden for delivery drivers (403)
✅ Backend: POST /api/delivery/report-driver requires minimum 10 characters in details (400)
✅ Backend: POST /api/delivery/report-driver validates category values (400)
✅ Backend: POST /api/delivery/report-driver returns 404 for invalid order
✅ Backend: Valid categories verified (سلوك_غير_لائق, تحرش, سرقة_احتيال, أخرى)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/driver-reports requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/driver-reports forbidden for customers (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/driver-reports forbidden for sellers (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/driver-reports forbidden for delivery drivers (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/admin/driver-reports returns reports with stats for admin (200)
✅ Backend: Reports response structure verified (id, driver_id, driver_name, reporter_id, reporter_name, reporter_type, order_id, category, category_label, details, status, created_at)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id} requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id} forbidden for non-admins (403)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id} validates action parameter (dismiss/terminate)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id} returns 404 for invalid report id
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/my-suspension-status requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/my-suspension-status forbidden for non-delivery users (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/my-suspension-status returns suspension info for delivery (200)
✅ Frontend: Admin login successful
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 'البلاغات الأخلاقية' tab with warning icon
✅ Frontend: DriverReportsTab displays stat cards (قيد المراجعة, مرفوض, تم الفصل, الإجمالي)
✅ Frontend: DriverReportsTab shows search input and refresh button
✅ Frontend: DriverReportsTab shows empty state when no reports
✅ Frontend: Customer can view order tracking page with delivery driver info
✅ Frontend: OrderTrackingPage shows 'موظف التوصيل' section with driver name
✅ Frontend: OrderTrackingPage shows 'بلاغ أخلاقي' button with warning icon
✅ Frontend: Report button has data-testid='report-driver-btn'
✅ Frontend: ReportDriverModal opens on button click
✅ Frontend: ReportDriverModal shows 4 category buttons (سلوك_غير_لائق, تحرش, سرقة_احتيال, أخرى)
✅ Frontend: ReportDriverModal has details textarea with 10 char minimum requirement
✅ Frontend: ReportDriverModal has submit and cancel buttons
✅ Frontend: ReportDriverModal shows warning about immediate driver suspension
critical_code_review_comments: delivery.py POST /report-driver correctly validates: category, details length (>=10), order existence, user association
delivery.py immediately suspends driver and updates delivery_documents status
delivery.py creates notifications for admin and driver
admin.py GET /driver-reports returns reports with stats breakdown (pending, dismissed, terminated)
admin.py PUT /driver-reports/{id} handles dismiss (reinstate) and terminate (fire) actions correctly
ReportDriverModal.js has all required data-testid attributes for testing
OrderTrackingPage.js shows report button only when delivery_driver exists
DriverReportsTab.js properly displays stats, search, and report cards
seed_data_creation: Used existing order F0E3A92D with delivery driver 'فهد المندوب' for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Driver Reports (Ethical Complaints) feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/delivery/report-driver (customer/seller submits report), GET /api/admin/driver-reports (admin views reports with stats), PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id}?action=dismiss|terminate (admin handles report). UI: DriverReportsTab in admin panel shows reports with stats. ReportDriverModal in OrderTrackingPage allows customers to submit reports. Report button only shows when order has delivery_driver_id.

create_report.auth: Customer or Seller only (403 for delivery)
create_report.effect: Immediately suspends driver, notifies admin and driver
